response: The serum and follicular fluid (FF) levels of 25OH-VD, as well as the FF levels of TNF-α, 25OH-VD, and TAC, were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits following the manufacturer's instructions and read with a 96-well microplate ELISA reader. Specifically, human serum 25-OHVD levels were determined using an ELISA kit (catalog no. [REDACTED], [REDACTED], [REDACTED]) via a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. Similarly, human serum TNF-α levels were measured with an ELISA kit (catalog no. [REDACTED], [REDACTED], [REDACTED]) using the same technique, and human serum TAC levels were assessed with an ELISA kit (catalog no. [REDACTED], [REDACTED], [REDACTED]) also employing a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay.
